GC-CLOUD WAVE 4 — MONTHLY STATUS REPORT
Reporting Period: February 2026
Report Date: March 1, 2026
Project Manager: Carol Nguyen
Status: GREEN

---

EXECUTIVE SUMMARY

GC-Cloud Wave 4 is progressing excellently. The team has made strong
progress across all workstreams and stakeholder engagement remains high.
We are confident in our ability to deliver the project on schedule and
within the approved parameters.

risks.description: Unplanned middleware remediation adds $340,000, exceeding approved budget by 14%.

evidence_refs.excerpt: The estimated cost of this remediation is $340,000, representing approximately 14% above the approved envelope of $2,400,000.

risks.description: Infrastructure assessment phase slipped three weeks, risking further downstream delays.

evidence_refs.excerpt: The infrastructure assessment phase required a slight adjustment of approximately three weeks from the original internal planning estimate.

risks.description: Middleware remediation scope was absent from original baseline, indicating incomplete requirements.

evidence_refs.excerpt: additional middleware remediation requirements not captured in the original scope baseline

risks.description: Budget revision not yet approved; project spending may proceed without formal authorization.

evidence_refs.excerpt: A formal budget revision request will be submitted to the Director for consideration.

risks.description: Procurement activities not yet complete, potentially delaying Q2 2026 implementation phase start.

evidence_refs.excerpt: entering the implementation phase in Q2 2026 following completion of the procurement activities
